allow: PowerShell($proc = \(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).OwningProcess; if \($proc\) { Stop-Process -Id $proc -Force; "Killed PID $proc" } else { "Port 3000 already free" })

PowerShell($proc = \(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).OwningProcess; if \($proc\) { Stop-Process -Id $proc -Force; "Killed PID $proc" } else { "Port 3000 free" })

PowerShell($old = \(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object State -eq 'Listen'\).OwningProcess; if \($old\) { Stop-Process -Id $old -Force; Write-Host "Killed PID $old" } else { Write-Host "Port 3000 was free" }; Start-Sleep -Seconds 1)

PowerShell($old = \(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object State -eq 'Listen'\).OwningProcess; if \($old\) { Stop-Process -Id $old -Force; Write-Host "Killed $old" })
